schedule.focus: Advanced training, event specialization, competition prep

what_to_bring: Running shoes (spikes optional for advanced athletes)

expectations.title: Arrive On Time
expectations.description: Please arrive 10-15 minutes early to check in and warm up with the group.

expectations.title: Be Prepared
expectations.description: Bring water, appropriate shoes, and dress for the weather conditions.

expectations.title: Stay Positive
expectations.description: Encourage teammates and maintain a growth mindset during training.

expectations.title: Listen to Coaches
expectations.description: Follow instructions and ask questions when you need clarification.

timeline.description: Athletes check in with coaches and begin group warm-up exercises.
Focused drills to improve running form, starts, and event-specific skills.
Event-specific training, conditioning, or speed work based on the day's plan.
Light jogging and stretching to aid recovery.
Coaches share announcements and athletes are dismissed to parents.
